_meta.description: SIT photo-analysis wording rules. Consumer-safe, non-diagnostic language only ("appears to show", "may suggest").

photoLabels.visible_dryness: There may be signs of dryness or dehydration in some areas.
photoLabels.dehydration: The skin looks like it may benefit from additional hydration.
photoLabels.dullness: The skin appears to have a lower level of radiance than optimal.
photoLabels.uneven_tone: There appears to be some variation in skin tone visible in the photo.
photoLabels.visible_redness: The photo appears to show some areas of visible redness.
photoLabels.shine_oiliness: There may be visible shine, which can suggest some oiliness.
photoLabels.congestion_appearance: There may be some visible congestion or pore appearance.
photoLabels.rough_texture: The skin surface appears to have some texture variation.
photoLabels.fine_line_appearance: There may be some fine line appearance visible in the photo.
photoLabels.barrier_stress: The skin shows patterns that may suggest barrier stress.
photoLabels.severe_concern: The photo shows a pattern that may need professional assessment. SIT recommends speaking with a dermatologist.
